info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Bloomberg Data API
Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get reference data for securities

items.docs: Retrieve reference data fields for one or more securities. Returns static or slowly changing descriptive data such as identifiers, classifications, issue details, and corporate information.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Search for securities

params.name: query
params.description: Security name, ticker, or identifier to search for

items.docs: Search for securities by name, ticker, ISIN, CUSIP, or other identifiers. Returns matching securities with key reference fields.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get historical data for securities

items.docs: Retrieve historical end-of-day data for one or more securities over a specified date range. Supports pricing, volume, fundamental, and derived fields with configurable periodicity.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get market data snapshot

items.docs: Retrieve a snapshot of current or delayed market data for one or more securities, including last price, bid, ask, volume, and other real-time fields.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get corporate actions for securities

items.docs: Retrieve corporate action events for one or more securities within a specified date range, including dividends, stock splits, mergers, spin-offs, and other corporate events.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Search available data fields

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Search and discover available Bloomberg data fields by keyword or category. Returns field metadata including mnemonics, descriptions, data types, and applicable security types.
